I'm actually really sad that Zenly is gone now.. it holds a special place in my heart as my fam and I found it during an extremely difficult time in our lives. We would just send emojis constantly and we all loved the quirky, fun and unique interface that it had during its early life that no other location sharing app did. I have no complaints honesty, to me, zenly was perfect, so thank you to everyone who worked so hard to make zenly what it was. I wish you all good luck for the future! ♥️

Snapchat is one of the most popular social media applications used by millions of people around the world. It is especially popular among young people because it allows users to communicate with friends in a fun and creative way. The main feature of Snapchat is sending “snaps,” which are photos or short videos that disappear after they are viewed. This makes conversations feel more private and natural compared to other social media platforms.

Overall, it's a great app to track your loved ones, and also makes you and your circle better drivers (Gold membership). A couple of small complaints, I get pinged for phone usage, even if I am parked somewhere (for example to load a new destination into my phone for gps navigation). And second, even if you put that you were a passenger on your past drives, you still get pinged for negative things (phone usage, rapid acceleration, hard braking). Fix these and 5 stars!
